SRO + QPC + PRTs.

project: PRJ03307 - Well Sanam - Qatar Head Office - TBC - MFC
comment:
The Wellsenam opportunity is still not clear in terms of when it will take place.

Baker is expected to mobilize on the 16th for one X-Y job using the new PRC34 modification to test it out. After this job, the client will decide the way forward.

project: PRJ03160 - SLB - SLB Denmark - GBN12 (N-12) - MFC_ ZeroTime
comment:
SLB should be at surface at 17:00 with the plug. READ-SLB Depth interface cable will then be tested.
Sample depth file received from CT and tested with Memlog data.
Depending if they get plug out easily we should be starting with MFC tomorrow morning.
Michel booked for chopper on Friday. After the cleanout below plug they will know if RCCL run is still contingent or not.
